{"name": "p2_guide", "visualType": "textbox", "droppedFields": [], "prototypeQuery": {"Version": 2, "From": [], "Select": []}, "vcObjects": {"general": [{"properties": {"paragraphs": [{"textRuns": [{"value": "RECOMMENDED VISUALS

Slicer: OutcomeName (select one at a time)

Continuous outcome — error metric cards:
  • RMSE  (same units as outcome)
  • MAE
  • MAPE
  • Mean Error (Bias)

Scatter chart:
  X axis: PredictedValue
  Y axis: ActualValue
  Add a 45-degree reference line
  (perfect predictions lie on the line)

Error summary table:
  SegmentLabel | OutcomeName | RMSE | MAE | MAPE

Win % Calibration (filter OutcomeName = WinPct):
  • Card: Win Rate Predicted (SUM PredictedValue / COUNT)
  • Card: Win Rate Actual (SUM ActualValue / COUNT)
  • Bar: Expected Wins vs Actual Wins by ServiceLineName", "textStyle": {"fontWeight": "normal", "fontSize": "11pt"}}], "horizontalTextAlignment": "left"}]}}]}}
